name: Blueberry Pie
description: A double-crust classic packed with sweet-tart blueberries and a hint of lemon. Baked until the top is deep golden and the filling is bubbling.

name: Apple Pie
description: Tender spiced apples wrapped in a flaky, all-butter crust. The one everyone asks for by name.

name: Peach Pie
description: Juicy peaches folded into a lightly spiced filling, baked into a golden lattice crust. A warm-weather favorite.

name: Strawberry Lemonade Pie
description: A bright, no-bake summer pie with sweet strawberries and a tangy lemonade filling in a graham crust.

name: Strawberry Rhubarb Pie
description: The classic sweet-and-tart pairing, baked into a buttery double crust until perfectly set.

name: Cookies
description: A dozen soft-baked, thick cookies made fresh to order. Ask about current flavors when you order.

name: Chocolate Chip Muffins
description: A half-dozen bakery-style muffins loaded with chocolate chips and a golden, domed top.

name: Banana Bread
description: A moist, richly spiced loaf made with ripe bananas. Great on its own or toasted with butter.
